column1: Supplementary Table 17 — Rare/low-frequency-instrument sensitivity of the forward MR

Forward MR repeated after excluding low-minor-allele-frequency (MAF) instruments. MAF from harmonized exposure allele frequencies (Longchamps, Gupta raw/adjusted); Chong instruments matched on shared low-MAF variants. Pooled estimate = naive inverse-variance-weighted point estimate; p = design-effect-corrected (rho=0.70). Per-instrument beta/SE from Supplementary Table 3; recomputation reproduces the primary per-panel and pooled estimates exactly.
